scenarios.name: Signup form with Yup validation and server-side error
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used Yup schema via validationSchema, ErrorMessage component, and setErrors in onSubmit for duplicate-email server validation exactly as in the SKILL; baseline used Formik but missed setErrors and used inline validate instead of schema.

scenarios.name: Dynamic team-member form with add/remove rows
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used FieldArray render-prop with push/remove and the members.${i}.name nested name pattern shown in the SKILL; baseline managed array state manually with useState rather than FieldArray.
